message:
fix: resolve cross-tab timestamp erasure, stats truncation, and compliance alignment (#9725)

Fixes #9699: In mergeMissions(), same-millisecond updatedAt collisions caused
the remote copy to always win, silently discarding local edits. Tie-break by
message count instead of always preferring remote.

Fixes #9708: The "Building trend…" label and the stat sublabel both rendered
simultaneously, overflowing the card height. Suppress "Building trend…" when a
sublabel is present — the sublabel is more informative and should take priority.

Fixes #9717: COMPLIANCE_STAT_BLOCKS defines block IDs 'checks_passing' and
'checks_failing', but getDashboardStatValue() switched on 'passing'/'failing'.
The mismatch caused those blocks to fall through to the default case, returning
'-' and breaking alignment for PCI, Gatekeeper, Kyverno, Kubescape, and CVE
stats in the Security Compliance dashboard.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
